variants.name: Block Buster
variants.flavor_text: The original. The classic. Break all the bricks. You know the drill.

variants.name: Brick Smasher '99
variants.flavor_text: Easy mode for babies. Wide paddle. Slow ball. Your grandma could beat this.

variants.name: Paddle Pro
variants.flavor_text: Hit position controls angle! Precision aiming for paddle professionals.

variants.name: Ball Blitz
variants.flavor_text: Fewer bricks but the ball is FAST. Blink and you lose.

variants.name: Triple Threat
variants.flavor_text: Three balls at once. Twice the bricks. Half the lives. Math checks out.

variants.name: Gravity Drop
variants.flavor_text: The ball falls like a rock. Physics class meets arcade action.

variants.name: Pyramid Scheme
variants.flavor_text: It's shaped like a pyramid. Get in early for maximum returns.

variants.name: Ice Breaker
variants.flavor_text: The paddle slides on ice. Momentum is everything. Braking is nothing.

variants.name: Power Play
variants.flavor_text: Powerups rain from the sky. Only the good ones though. We're not monsters.

variants.name: Avalanche Alert
variants.flavor_text: The bricks are falling! Break them before they reach the bottom or... nothing happens. But it FEELS urgent.

variants.name: Ghost Ball
variants.flavor_text: The ball passes through walls like a ghost. Haunted arcade cabinet energy.

variants.name: Brick Blaster
variants.flavor_text: Your paddle has a gun now. Press SPACE. Questions later.

variants.name: Dark Zone
variants.flavor_text: Someone turned off the lights. You can only see around the ball. Good luck.

variants.name: Sticky Situation
variants.flavor_text: Ball sticks to the paddle. Aim carefully. Release with SPACE. Very tactical.

variants.name: Speed Demon 2000
variants.flavor_text: Starts slow. Gets faster. Every. Single. Bounce. How long can you keep up?

variants.name: Obstacle Course
variants.flavor_text: Indestructible obstacles block your shots. Just kidding, they're destructible. Hit them 3 times.

variants.name: Circle Circus
variants.flavor_text: Round bricks in a round pattern. The squares are not invited to this party.

variants.name: Random Rampage
variants.flavor_text: Random brick placement. Random bounce angles. Random powerups. Random vibes.

variants.name: Last Ball Standing
variants.flavor_text: One life. One chance. Powerups are your only hope. Shield or die.

variants.name: BRICK APOCALYPSE
variants.flavor_text: Everything at once. Falling bricks. Moving bricks. Obstacles. Powerups. Two balls. Health bricks. Shake. THIS IS IT.
